notes: United States imported 2026-05-24 from the national-team current squad table because the central 2026 FIFA World Cup squads article currently has no parseable United States squad table.

United States audit 2026-05-24: verifier found no better official/tournament squad table before the announced 2026-05-26 U.S. Soccer roster reveal; all 26 rows match the current-squad table and all existing photos/QIDs are valid. Sebastian Berhalter has a Wikidata DOB conflict, and several Wikidata-derived current_club_qid values are stale, so source-table club text remains authoritative.
